title: Add within 20 visually
description: Add within 20 using number lines, place value blocks, ten frames, and groups of objects.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Add.**  
*Hint: Use the number line to help solve $6+1$.*

$\Large\blueE6 + \maroonD1 ={}$ [[☃ numeric-input 1]]

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5b5734b8be9d13f9cdb92ec2643aef8e037820c2)
